svg.title: Ethernet preamble and SFD showing 7 bytes of 10101010 followed by SFD 10101011 then frame
svg.desc: Timeline showing 7 preamble bytes, then SFD byte with last two bits highlighted as 11 instead of 10, then Ethernet frame data begins.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PLL lock onto the preamble?')
sendPrompt('What are all the fields inside an Ethernet frame?')
g.text: dst MAC, src MAC, data, CRC

svg.text: Bit-level view at the SFD boundary
